value.rationale: The fetched page is a Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG) blog post about adversarial/threat actor use of AI tools (distillation attacks, phishing augmentation, malware development, etc.). It does not mention, describe, or substantiate any Google offering for "Security scanning / threat model" that scans code or agent actions for security issues against a threat model. The page contains no reference to such a product or feature.
